name: 50YardsLonger
about: 50 Yards Longer is a professional golf club fitting company operating primarily at the SwingFitGolfClub facility in the Mid-West. They are a brand agnostic fitting service, stocking high-performing equipment from all major manufacturers and utilizing a team of Master Club Fitters and Builders. Their services range from one-hour sessions for driver or iron fittings to comprehensive 2-3 hour full bag fittings. The company emphasizes a data-driven approach using advanced launch monitor technology to ensure clubs are precisely tailored to a golfer's swing DNA for optimal performance on the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Utilizes premium, tour-level launch monitor technology like TrackMan, FlightScope, and SkyTrak for precise data analysis
Offers a unique mobile 'Ultimate Custom Fit Golf Lab' service, bringing professional fitting to your home or club
Brand agnostic approach ensures customers are fit with the best performing equipment, not limited to specific brands
Professional Master Club Builders hand-craft clubs to exact specifications and ship them directly to the customer

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen is mentioned, but BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is not explicitly prohibited, suggesting outside food and drink may be permitted.
No on-site bar is mentioned, but BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is not explicitly prohibited, suggesting outside alcohol may be permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan is used for ball flight data and swing analysis.
FlightScope Doppler radar technology is used for launch monitoring and club fitting.
SkyTrak is used as an ultimate indoor and outdoor launch monitor, with demo days available for customers.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, 50 Yards Longer provides a selection of demo clubs for fitting. You do not need to bring your own equipment to the session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention an on-site kitchen or bar. It does not explicitly prohibit outside food and drink, so it may be permissible.

faq.question: How long does a full 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time for a full 18-hole simulation. Fitting sessions for clubs can range from 1 hour for a single club type to 2-3 hours for a full bag fitting.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 50 Yards Longer is kid-friendly. They mention having demo clubs for 'all ages and sizes' and offer services for 'the beginning golfer,' making it suitable for juniors and youth.
